selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

"opinion": "As a 52-year-old woman, carpenter living in Chicago, I understand the importance of managing and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines. As someone who has been through a lot of ups and downs in life, I believe that it's crucial to approach these conversations with empathy and understanding. Here are some tips that I have found helpful:",
"reasoning_summary": "By using the five steps of the cognitive appraisal theory, I was able to identify the underlying causes of my anxiety when discussing healthcare and COVID vaccines. By understanding the cognitive distortions that were causing my anxiety, I was able to develop a more rational and constructive approach to these conversations. Here are the five steps of the cognitive appraisal theory: 1) Identify the situation or stimulus that triggered your anxiety. 2) Evaluate the situation using the ABCDE method (i.e. is it good, bad, or neutral?). 3) Consider alternative interpretations of the situation. 4) Evaluate the consequences of each interpretation. 5) Select the most constructive interpretation and develop a plan to manage your anxiety.",

Here are some tips that I have found helpful:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: By using the five steps of the cognitive appraisal theory, I was able to identify the underlying causes of my anxiety when discussing healthcare and COVID vaccines. By understanding the cognitive distortions that were causing my anxiety, I was able to develop a more rational and constructive approach to these conversations. Here are the five steps of the cognitive appraisal theory: 1) Identify the situation or stimulus that triggered your anxiety. 2) Evaluate the situation using the ABCDE method (i.e. is it good, bad, or neutral?). 3) Consider alternative interpretations of the situation. 4) Evaluate the consequences of each interpretation. 5) Select the most constructive interpretation and develop a plan to manage your anxiety.
